first_stage.candidate_construction: complete BM25 and dense rankings fused with equal-weight reciprocal rank fusion
first_stage.tie_break: descending fused score, then ascending document_id

reranker.architecture: BertForSequenceClassification, 6 layers, hidden size 384, 12 attention heads, one output label
reranker.intended_domain: English passage ranking trained on MS MARCO
reranker.score_interpretation: raw single relevance logit with Identity activation; higher is more relevant
reranker.tie_break: descending reranker score, then ascending pre-rerank rank, then ascending document_id
reranker.justification: a compact locally executable English passage-ranking cross-encoder provides direct pairwise relevance scoring while fixed depth and ordering avoid smoke-outcome tuning

trace_contract.selected_hits: 12 hits ranked by raw reranker logit
trace_contract.all_candidates: up to 48 records per task, limited by schema-document count, with document identity, B4 fused score and pre-rank, raw BM25 and dense scores, component ranks and RRF contributions, reranker score, post-rank, and selected status
trace_contract.metadata: reranker identity, immutable revision, pair format, truncation, batch size, score semantics, tie-break, configuration digest, software revision, dependencies, and local-model settings

schema_pack.table_hit: include every column in the selected table
schema_pack.column_hits_only: include selected columns, primary-key columns, and selected-table join endpoints
schema_pack.foreign_keys: include edges whose endpoint tables are selected, in lexicographic order
schema_pack.serialization: one complete table declaration per line followed by FK lines

reproducibility_limitations: CPU and math-library differences can produce small dense or cross-encoder score differences
stable ordering resolves exact ties but cannot eliminate near-tie reversals caused by numerical differences
hosted SQL generation remains nondeterministic and uses committed response recordings for replay
the reranker was trained for English passage ranking rather than schema retrieval

pre_generation_pack_audit.inputs: public questions and database catalogs only
